zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强上行格局
zh.content:
当前ADA整体呈震荡偏强上行结构，价格稳站20日均线上方，短线多头占优但尚未突破前高压力区，市场仍以区间上移为主节奏延续运行

MACD指标已转正并保持轻微放量，显示短期动能修复；价格位于SMA20上方运行，均线支撑有效，但RSI缺失限制超买判断

下方关键支撑位位于0.1675及0.1643（20日均线），若失守或引发回踩；上方阻力在0.1712及0.175区域，突破需放量确认

短线建议依托0.1675上方逢低布局，回踩SMA20附近可分批介入；若跌破0.164则转为观望，反弹目标关注0.175一线

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is maintaining a constructive short-term bullish bias, trading at 0.169682 after gaining 1.17% over the past 24 hours. The price remains comfortably above the 20-period SMA at 0.164298, indicating that buyers continue to control the near-term trend. The session range between 0.167522 and 0.171233 shows steady upward momentum, although price is beginning to test an area where profit-taking could emerge.

Momentum indicators generally support the positive outlook. While the RSI(14) is unavailable, the MACD value of 0.0015827 remains positive, suggesting bullish momentum is still present. The absence of a signal-line reading limits confirmation strength, but the positive MACD reading combined with price holding above the moving average points to continued buying interest. Traders should nevertheless monitor momentum closely, as recent gains may encourage short-term consolidation.

Key support is located around 0.1675, corresponding to the recent intraday low, with stronger support near the SMA zone around 0.1643. A break below these levels could weaken the current bullish structure and expose the market to deeper retracement. On the upside, immediate resistance appears near 0.1712, the recent high. A decisive move above this level would likely attract additional buyers and could open the path toward the next psychological resistance area around 0.1750.

From a trading perspective, momentum-oriented participants may consider maintaining a bullish stance while price remains above 0.1675 and especially above the 20-period SMA. Conservative traders could wait for a confirmed breakout above 0.1712 before entering new long positions. Meanwhile, a failure to hold support may favor short-term profit-taking or defensive risk management. Position sizing and stop-loss placement remain important, as cryptocurrency markets can experience rapid volatility even within otherwise favorable technical trends.
